name: Penne with Vodka & Tomato Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain, seed and chop the tomatoes.
2. Melt butter with oil in a heavy large saucepan over medium heat.
3. Add onion and saute until translucent, about 5 minutes.
4. Add chopped tomatoes and cook until almost no liquid remains in pan, stirring frequently, about 25 minutes.
5. Add cream, vodka, and red pepper and boil until thickened to sauce consistency, about 25 minutes.
6. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
(Sauce can be prepared 1 day ahead. Cover and refrigerate.)
7. Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water until just tender but still firm to bite, stirring occasionally.
8. Drain well.
9. Transfer sauce to a simmer.
10. Pour over pasta and toss well.
11. Sprinkle with Parmesan and chives and serve.
